steps.title: Recognize the example
steps.content: The first sentence makes a general point about demonstration sports in Olympic Games. The second sentence gives a specific instance: glima appeared as a demonstration sport at the 1912 Summer Olympics.

steps.title: Use an example transition
steps.content: B suggests simultaneous events, but the sentence is not about two parallel actions. C points to the future, though the 1912 Olympics are historical. D signals contrast, but the glima detail illustrates the general statement. The remaining transition correctly introduces an example. The answer is A.
